text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Greetings! And, once again, welcome to Tracen
Academy!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Inspiring! I'm looking forward to seeing more of
your illustrious efforts with the Umamusume in
your care!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
So! To guide you through the process, I'll be
assigning you some tasks. In other words, I have a
number of missions for you to complete!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, upon completing these missions,
you shall receive... rewards! You'll receive gifts
from me as well!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I paid for all of this out of pocket, so I kindly ask
that you keep this a secret from Tazuna!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Press on! Strive with all your might! For yourself
and, above all, for the racers in your charge!
